title: TelemetryEvent
description: Canonical event shape for the per-match anonymous-stats emission pipeline. Authored by docs/architecture/observability.md. Privacy rules forbid PII, IPs, and peer IDs; only pack hashes, engine hashes, faction IDs, and aggregate metrics are allowed.

kind.description: Stable event identifier following the dotted-domain.code naming convention (e.g. desync.detected, pack.load.failed, ai.provider.error, save.corrupt).

timestamp.description: Wall-clock millis since epoch on the emitting client. Telemetry is presentation-side; deterministic gameplay never reads this field.

engineHash.description: Engine build digest the emitting client is running (RR-09 / determinism contract).

packHashes.description: Optional content-pack digests in load order. Hashes only — never pack names that could leak user-installed content lists.

fields.description: Stage-specific structured fields (numeric metrics, faction IDs, error codes). MUST NOT carry PII, IP addresses, peer IDs, message contents, save names, or free-form user text.

severity.description: Optional severity hint, used by the metrics sink to choose backend routing.
